name: TRAIL Phase 1 - Graph Construction v5 (Independent DST)

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "statements": [{ "statement": "MATCH (e:Event) RETURN e.apt AS apt, count(e) AS cnt" }] }

parameters.jsCode:
// v4: Format URL with DST beliefs + timing
const meta = $('Split IOCs in Batches').first().json;
const enriched = $input.first().json;

return [{
  event_id: meta.event_id,
  event_name: meta.event_name,
  apt_label: meta.apt_label,
  nation_state: meta.nation_state || '',
  activity_cluster: meta.activity_cluster || '',
  // DST beliefs
  belief_named_actor: meta.belief_named_actor,
  belief_nation_state: meta.belief_nation_state,
  belief_activity_cluster: meta.belief_activity_cluster,
  uncertainty: meta.uncertainty,
  conflict_factor: meta.conflict_factor,
  tag_confidence: meta.tag_confidence,
  // Timing
  pulse_created: meta.pulse_created || '',
  pulse_modified: meta.pulse_modified || '',
  indicator_created: meta.indicator_created || '',
  // URL data
  url: meta.ioc,
  extracted_domain: enriched.extracted_domain || '',
  path: enriched.path || '',
  tld: enriched.tld || '',
  length: enriched.length || 0,
  digit_count: enriched.digit_count || 0,
  special_char_count: enriched.special_char_count || 0,
  path_depth: enriched.path_depth || 0,
  has_query: enriched.has_query || false,
  has_fragment: enriched.has_fragment || false,
  entropy: enriched.entropy || 0.0,
  file_extension: enriched.file_extension || '',
  http_status: enriched.http_status,
  content_type: enriched.content_type || '',
  server: enriched.server || '',
  head_failed: enriched.head_failed !== undefined ? enriched.head_failed : true,
  resolved_ip: enriched.resolved_ip
}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "statements": [
    {
      "statement": "MERGE (e:Event {id: $event_id}) SET e.apt = $apt_label, e.nation_state = $nation_state, e.activity_cluster = $activity_cluster, e.type = 'Report', e.name = $event_name, e.label_confidence = $label_confidence, e.belief_named_actor = $belief_named_actor, e.belief_nation_state = $belief_nation_state, e.uncertainty = $uncertainty, e.tag_exclusivity = $tag_exclusivity, e.evidence_weight = $evidence_weight, e.nation_coherence = $nation_coherence, e.pulse_created = $pulse_created, e.pulse_modified = $pulse_modified MERGE (u:URL {value: $url}) SET u.domain = $extracted_domain, u.path = $path, u.tld = $tld, u.length = $length, u.digit_count = $digit_count, u.special_char_count = $special_char_count, u.path_depth = $path_depth, u.has_query = $has_query, u.has_fragment = $has_fragment, u.entropy = $entropy, u.file_extension = $file_extension, u.http_status = $http_status, u.content_type = $content_type, u.server = $server, u.head_failed = $head_failed MERGE (e)-[rel:InReport]->(u) SET rel.indicator_created = $indicator_created WITH u, $extracted_domain AS dom, $resolved_ip AS rip WHERE dom IS NOT NULL AND dom <> '' MERGE (d:Domain {value: dom}) MERGE (u)-[:HostedOn]->(d) WITH u, rip WHERE rip IS NOT NULL AND rip <> '' MERGE (ip:IP {value: rip}) MERGE (u)-[:ResolvesTo]->(ip)",
      "parameters": {
        "event_id": $json.event_id,
        "event_name": $json.event_name,
        "apt_label": $json.apt_label,
        "nation_state": $json.nation_state,
        "activity_cluster": $json.activity_cluster,
        "label_confidence": $json.label_confidence,
        "belief_named_actor": $json.belief_named_actor,
        "belief_nation_state": $json.belief_nation_state,
        "uncertainty": $json.uncertainty,
        "tag_exclusivity": $json.tag_exclusivity,
        "evidence_weight": $json.evidence_weight,
        "nation_coherence": $json.nation_coherence,
        "pulse_created": $json.pulse_created,
        "pulse_modified": $json.pulse_modified,
        "indicator_created": $json.indicator_created,
        "url": $json.url,
        "extracted_domain": $json.extracted_domain,
        "path": $json.path,
        "tld": $json.tld,
        "length": $json.length,
        "digit_count": $json.digit_count,
        "special_char_count": $json.special_char_count,
        "path_depth": $json.path_depth,
        "has_query": $json.has_query,
        "has_fragment": $json.has_fragment,
        "entropy": $json.entropy,
        "file_extension": $json.file_extension,
        "http_status": $json.http_status,
        "content_type": $json.content_type,
        "server": $json.server,
        "head_failed": $json.head_failed,
        "resolved_ip": $json.resolved_ip
      }
    }
  ]
} }}

={{ {
  "statements": [
    {
      "statement": "MERGE (e:Event {id: $event_id}) SET e.apt = $apt_label, e.nation_state = $nation_state, e.activity_cluster = $activity_cluster, e.type = 'Report', e.name = $event_name, e.label_confidence = $label_confidence, e.belief_named_actor = $belief_named_actor, e.belief_nation_state = $belief_nation_state, e.uncertainty = $uncertainty, e.tag_exclusivity = $tag_exclusivity, e.evidence_weight = $evidence_weight, e.nation_coherence = $nation_coherence, e.pulse_created = $pulse_created, e.pulse_modified = $pulse_modified MERGE (d:Domain {value: $domain}) SET d.tld = $tld, d.length = $length, d.digit_count = $digit_count, d.period_count = $period_count, d.entropy = $entropy, d.is_nxdomain = $is_nxdomain, d.active_period_days = $active_period_days, d.a_count = $a_count, d.aaaa_count = $aaaa_count, d.mx_count = $mx_count, d.ns_count = $ns_count, d.soa_count = $soa_count, d.txt_count = $txt_count, d.cname_count = $cname_count, d.ptr_count = $ptr_count, d.srv_count = $srv_count MERGE (e)-[rel:InReport]->(d) SET rel.indicator_created = $indicator_created WITH d, $asn AS asn_num, $asn_description AS asn_desc, $country AS country WHERE asn_num IS NOT NULL AND asn_num <> '' MERGE (a:ASN {number: asn_num}) SET a.description = asn_desc, a.country = country",
      "parameters": {
        "event_id": $json.event_id,
        "event_name": $json.event_name,
        "apt_label": $json.apt_label,
        "nation_state": $json.nation_state,
        "activity_cluster": $json.activity_cluster,
        "label_confidence": $json.label_confidence,
        "belief_named_actor": $json.belief_named_actor,
        "belief_nation_state": $json.belief_nation_state,
        "uncertainty": $json.uncertainty,
        "tag_exclusivity": $json.tag_exclusivity,
        "evidence_weight": $json.evidence_weight,
        "nation_coherence": $json.nation_coherence,
        "pulse_created": $json.pulse_created,
        "pulse_modified": $json.pulse_modified,
        "indicator_created": $json.indicator_created,
        "domain": $json.domain,
        "tld": $json.tld,
        "length": $json.length,
        "digit_count": $json.digit_count,
        "period_count": $json.period_count,
        "entropy": $json.entropy,
        "is_nxdomain": $json.is_nxdomain,
        "active_period_days": $json.active_period_days,
        "a_count": $json.a_count,
        "aaaa_count": $json.aaaa_count,
        "mx_count": $json.mx_count,
        "ns_count": $json.ns_count,
        "soa_count": $json.soa_count,
        "txt_count": $json.txt_count,
        "cname_count": $json.cname_count,
        "ptr_count": $json.ptr_count,
        "srv_count": $json.srv_count,
        "asn": $json.asn,
        "asn_description": $json.asn_description,
        "country": $json.country
      }
    }
  ]
} }}

={{ {
  "statements": [
    {
      "statement": "MERGE (e:Event {id: $event_id}) SET e.apt = $apt_label, e.nation_state = $nation_state, e.activity_cluster = $activity_cluster, e.type = 'Report', e.name = $event_name, e.label_confidence = $label_confidence, e.belief_named_actor = $belief_named_actor, e.belief_nation_state = $belief_nation_state, e.uncertainty = $uncertainty, e.tag_exclusivity = $tag_exclusivity, e.evidence_weight = $evidence_weight, e.nation_coherence = $nation_coherence, e.pulse_created = $pulse_created, e.pulse_modified = $pulse_modified MERGE (ip:IP {value: $ip}) SET ip.country = $country, ip.asn = $asn, ip.asn_description = $asn_description MERGE (e)-[rel:InReport]->(ip) SET rel.indicator_created = $indicator_created WITH ip, $asn AS asn_num, $asn_description AS asn_desc, $country AS country WHERE asn_num IS NOT NULL AND asn_num <> '' MERGE (a:ASN {number: asn_num}) SET a.description = asn_desc, a.country = country MERGE (ip)-[:InGroup]->(a)",
      "parameters": {
        "event_id": $json.event_id,
        "event_name": $json.event_name,
        "apt_label": $json.apt_label,
        "nation_state": $json.nation_state,
        "activity_cluster": $json.activity_cluster,
        "label_confidence": $json.label_confidence,
        "belief_named_actor": $json.belief_named_actor,
        "belief_nation_state": $json.belief_nation_state,
        "uncertainty": $json.uncertainty,
        "tag_exclusivity": $json.tag_exclusivity,
        "evidence_weight": $json.evidence_weight,
        "nation_coherence": $json.nation_coherence,
        "pulse_created": $json.pulse_created,
        "pulse_modified": $json.pulse_modified,
        "indicator_created": $json.indicator_created,
        "ip": $json.ip,
        "country": $json.country,
        "asn": $json.asn,
        "asn_description": $json.asn_description
      }
    }
  ]
} }}
